title: Remote Camera Disconnected
message: Gate 01 Camera is no longer connected to the command center.
action: Monitor the remaining connected cameras.

title: Camera Integrity Alert: Frozen Frame
message: Camera image appears frozen. Check network stream, cable, or camera source.
action: Inspect the camera lens, lighting, cable, or network connection.

title: Remote Camera Connected
message: Gate 01 Camera is now connected to the command center.
action: Monitor the camera view, crowd activity, and camera health.

title: Camera Integrity Alert: Blurred Lens
message: Camera image is blurry. Clean lens or adjust focus. Source: webcam. Signal quality: Weak.
action: Check camera source, lens, stream, lighting, cable, or network immediately.

metadata.message: Camera image is blurry. Clean lens or adjust focus.

title: Camera Integrity Alert: Blurred Lens

title: Monitoring Engine Started
message: CrowdVision AI started on profile webcam using Laptop Webcam in LOW mode.
action: Check monitoring engine status.

title: Edge Worker Stopped
